page.title: Scoring
page.description: Built for fast entry on phones and desktops.
page.offline: Network offline. Scoring actions are temporarily disabled.
page.locked: Workspace is {{status}}; all scoring actions are disabled.
page.viewerOnly: You only have view access to this workspace.

quick.title: Quick actions
quick.description: Add/remove medals, or buy pieces / items from the workspace rule snapshot.
quick.shopMissing: No shop config in the rule snapshot.
quick.shopLoadingAlert: Loading shop config from workspace ranking…
quick.shopMissingAlert: Ranking has no shop snapshot. Reload the page or check the ranking API.
quick.notEnough: Not enough medals: need {{need}} HH, team has {{have}} HH (short {{missing}}).
quick.pieceLimit: Shop limit: before {{activity}} each team may buy up to {{max}} pieces (bought {{bought}}, remaining {{remaining}}).

rank.title: Game ranking
rank.description: Each place belongs to one team. Save the full result at once.
rank.incomplete: Assign every team a unique place.
rank.confirmBody: Results will be saved in a single atomic transaction.

ledger.title: Score history
ledger.description: No direct edit or delete; adjustments and purchases can be reversed with a reason.
ledger.emptyMessage: Scoring and purchase entries will appear here.

parseDelta.invalidFormat: Only signed integers are accepted, e.g. +5 or -2

shop.title: Shop
shop.inactive: Shop is no longer active for the current cycle.
shop.rankingGate: Pieces / items are used for ranking eligibility.
shop.pieceDesc: Need at least {{count}} pieces to rank above teams that are short. The shop trades medals for pieces, not game bonus points.
shop.limitActive: Limit active: before {{activity}} finishes, each team may buy up to {{max}} shop pieces{{boughtPart}}.
shop.limitInactive: Shop limit for {{activity}} is inactive (activity finalized) — further buys are not blocked by the max.
shop.itemDesc: Bought with medals. Not used for eligibility like pieces.
